image.shortdescription: a quadrilateral whose sides are labeled ((1/2)*Z), ((3/5)*T), ((4/5)*w), and ((5/6)*w).

solution.p: The perimeter is the result from adding the six sides together: {\frac{1}{2}}Z + {\frac{5}{6}}w + T + Z + {\frac{4}{5}}w + {\frac{3}{5}}T\text{.} There are two Z-terms, two w-terms, and two T-terms. We combine each pair of like terms and the perimeter is {\frac{3}{2}Z+\frac{49}{30}w+\frac{8}{5}T}\text{.}
